Dear Rahul, 

This is XYZ Pvt. Ltd. HR team. We would like to schedule your interview for the Software Engineer role on 15th April at 10:00 AM. Venue: 123, Main Street, Bandra, Mumbai. 

Please confirm your availability by replying YES or suggest an alternative slot. 

Best regards,
HR Team
spam:
URGENT! 🚨

Kya aapka traffic violation notice pending hai? Aapke licence par Rs. 1500 ka challan pending hai. 

Jaldi se payment karein <URL> 24 ghante ke andar. Nahi kiya to licence cancel ho sakta hai. 

Dhanyavaad!
